goal: Ensure Terraform configuration is formatted and valid in both environments
summary: Phase 3 completed: Terraform formatting check passed, and terraform validate passed in both dev and prod environments.
stepSummaries:
1. Run terraform fmt -recursive -check terraform/ [verified]
  2. Run terraform validate in dev [verified]
  3. Run terraform validate in prod [verified]
